title: Real Knowledge | Bhagavad Gita 13.01- 13.04 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Today we are going to discuss from the Bhagavad Gita as it is, 13th chapter, verse number 1 to 4.
The purports, the wonderful instructions which we received from Srila Prabhupada at the basis of this discussion.
So all credit goes to Srila Prabhupada for opening our eyes, giving us this beautiful knowledge.
The best part about Srila Prabhupada books is, even before I came to Krishna Consciousness,
I have read many books of many organizations, religious organizations.
You could say I was inquisitive in the sense, I was always having the big question in my mind as to what is real happiness.
So I will share some other time, when I was in college,
I tried many things, I even went for a rock show.
Went with my friends, tried different things.
But then always the big question, what will give us real happiness, was unanswered.
And the beauty of Srila Prabhupada books is, he is very direct.
Some of the questions, profound questions of life which we think that nobody has clear answers.
It's all hazy, it's all vague, it's a matter of belief.
It's a matter of word jugglery.
We see Prabhupada giving very concise, very clear answers.
So that is his greatest contribution.
